channel.title: Features on BurningXFlame
channel.description: Recent content in Features on BurningXFlame

item.title: DS
item.description: Generic Data Structures Auto-scalable Ring Buffer, Double Ended Queue Ringbuf is auto-scalable ring buffer. Ringbuf also implements deque (Double Ended Queue).

item.title: Iterator
item.description: Generic Iterator with Lazy Evaluation In contrast to eager evaluation where evaluation is performed immediately, an Iterator is lazily evaluated, i.

item.title: ID
item.description: NanoID A Go implementation of NanoID ↗ . NanoID can be expressed as regex [A-Za-z0-9_-]{21}. NanoID is case-sensative. In contrast to UUID v4,

item.title: Log
item.description: Logging Facade Log is a logging facade with leveled logging, tagged logging. For Logger Implementers Implement interface log.Logger // A concrete logger should implement interface Logger.

item.title: Net
item.description: Connection Pool ConnPool is a concurrency-safe connection pool. import "github.com/burningxflame/gx/net/connpool" // Create a connection pool pool, err := connpool.New(connpool.Conf{ // Initial number of connections in the pool Init: 8, // Max number of connections in the pool Cap: 16, // Used to create a connection New: func() (net.

item.title: Reliable
item.description: Provides utilities to improve application reliability. Typical Use Case For example, you develop a TCP service, and deploy the service to K8S.

item.title: Runtime
item.description: Goroutine ID GID provides an extremely fast (1.2 ns) method to get the ID of the current goroutine. More precisely speaking, it’s the address of the current g (i.

item.title: Secure
item.description: Provides utilities to improve application security. Secure TCP Server The Secure TCP Server has builtin abilities to defend against DDoS attacks, to defend against slow attacks, to close idle connections, etc.

item.title: Sync
item.description: Semaphore Semaphore is commonly used for limiting max concurrency, e.g. limiting max number of concurrent connections. Use import "github.com/burningxflame/gx/sync/sem" // Create a semaphore.

item.title: UDS
item.description: Unix Domain Socket HTTP Server over UDS import ( "net/http" uh "github.com/burningxflame/gx/uds/http" ) // Create an HTTP server over UDS srv := &uh.
